gaps.description: Docker deployment (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, setup.sh) present in install/
Remote profiles.json fetch with local cache — CDN URL configured but fallback to default.json not fully verified
Hardware-adaptive model selection wired through optimizer.js into llm.js loadConfig()
Multi-device session coordination (joinSession/broadcastSession) implemented; deep cross-device brain state sharing is minimal
Ollama auto-install and model pull with progress display implemented in cli/setup.js
sense.js startWakeWordPipeline() is a stub — logs warning, no real mic/audio capture on server
Wake word server-side pipeline: hub.js wires wakeword event to brainChat but sense stub means it never fires
Voice latency <2s end-to-end (STT+LLM+TTS) not benchmarked or enforced in code
HTTPS via httpsServer.js + cert.js exists; LAN tunnel (ngrok/cloudflare) not implemented
LLM runtime with local Ollama + cloud fallback (OpenAI/Anthropic)
STT/TTS adaptive runtime with hardware-based provider selection
Memory module with vector embedding (agentic-store + embed.js)
Admin UI and client voice UI (Vue 3 + Vite)
Hardware detection (GPU/memory/arch) for Apple Silicon / NVIDIA / CPU-only
VAD client-side composable exists; server-side VAD integration missing
npx agentic-service one-command startup — cli/setup.js exists but bin entrypoint not verified
